claude.disabled_reason: 2026-06-15: claude -p draws from separate Agent SDK credit pool after billing change; use in-session lane-auditor subagents instead. Codex runner is unaffected.

rationale: Deterministic run driver for start-and-walk-away suite runs. It spawns ONE fresh headless model session per budget-leg, so each leg pays the per-turn harness tax once instead of one marathon session paying it hundreds of times. Legs resume from durable state, so context is cleared automatically between legs. BILLING: default_runner is 'codex' so legs run via `codex exec` (OpenAI billing) and never require ANTHROPIC_API_KEY/ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN. The 'claude' runner is disabled because `claude -p` draws from a separate Agent SDK credit pool after the billing change. VERIFY BEFORE A REAL RUN: the command templates are starting points -- for an UNATTENDED runner leg you may need to confirm exact non-interactive permission flags against your installed CLI version. {repo_root}, {model}, and {prompt} are substituted at spawn time. {model} is resolved from the run's SONNET-STATE file (normal->sonnet, exhausted->opus).
